name: squad-build
description: Reference implementation and documentation for building AMESA agents and simulators using the AMESA SDK.

v1.description: SDK v1 reference docs and full example. Uses Ray/RLlib training — no Redis required.

files.trainer.md: Trainer — v1 config reference, Ray/RLlib-based training loop
files.agent.md: Agent — construction APIs (declarative, tree, context-manager), key methods
files.perceptors.md: PerceptorImpl — observation transformation, job JSON schema for perceptors[] entries (impl, PerceptorOptions config: remote_address/sensor_space/action_space)
files.spaces.md: Spaces — Box, Discrete, Dict, Tuple, MultiBinary, MultiDiscrete
files.goals.md: Goal system — higher-level skill objectives, alternative to manual SkillTeacher reward
files.training_job.md: TrainerJobConfig — full job JSON format, all targets (local/docker/kubernetes/kubernetes_job/amesa), AgentSchema (environment_name, skill_to_train), skill serialization (remote_address on all skill types), learning/resources/model blocks, model_io, post_processing (record/benchmark), graph
files.inference.md: Running a trained policy from a checkpoint — Policy.from_checkpoint (not PPO.from_checkpoint), compute_single_action pattern

files.overview.md: Skill types and implementation types — v1 support matrix
files.teacher.md: SkillTeacher — required and optional methods, action_space, quirks (compute_reward must return Python float in v1)
files.coordinated.md: SkillCoach / SkillCoordinatedSet — required methods, job JSON schema for skills_coordinated[] entries (SkillCoordinatedOptions: remote_address, impl_cls, learning, resources, model, model_io, skills)

full_example.description: Complete end-to-end v1 example: a greenhouse climate simulator paired with a multi-skill agent.

agent.description: Agent-side code: skills, perceptors, teacher, and training runner.

files.build_agent.py: Assembles and registers the Agent with all skills and perceptors
files.perceptors.py: Perceptor implementations for the greenhouse agent
files.teacher.py: SkillTeacher — reward, success, and termination logic
files.run_training_local.py: Entry point for running a training job locally

sim.description: Simulator-side code: ServerAmesa implementation, scenarios, and local runner.

files.server_impl.py: ServerAmesa subclass wiring the sim to AMESA gRPC
files.run_local.py: Entry point for running the simulator locally

v2.description: SDK v2 reference docs and full example. Uses Redis-stream event-based training architecture.

docs.description: SDK v2 reference documentation. Ground-truth for v2 API usage, component interfaces, config, and quirks. Prefer these over distilled_docs or schemas when they conflict.

files.trainer.md: Trainer — v2 config reference, Redis-stream event-based training loop; training_cycles required on Skill (raises ValueError if absent); COMPOSABL_LICENSE accepted as alias for AMESA_LICENSE in remote Docker containers
files.simulator.md: ServerAmesa — sim interface, server bootstrap, Dockerfile pattern, Docker env vars
files.agent.md: Agent — construction APIs (declarative, tree, context-manager), key methods
files.perceptors.md: PerceptorImpl — observation transformation, v2 opt-in requirement, __await__ required on PerceptorImpl subclasses for v2 episode reset, job JSON schema for perceptors[] entries (impl, PerceptorOptions config: remote_address/sensor_space/action_space)
files.spaces.md: Spaces — Box, Discrete, Dict, Tuple, MultiBinary, MultiDiscrete
files.training_job.md: TrainerJobConfig — full job JSON format, v2 target only, AgentSchema (environment_name, skill_to_train), skill serialization (remote_address on all skill types), learning/resources/model blocks, model_io, post_processing (record/benchmark), graph

files.overview.md: Skill types and implementation types — v2 support matrix
files.teacher.md: SkillTeacher — required and optional methods, action_space, quirks
files.coordinated.md: SkillCoach / SkillCoordinatedSet — NOT available in v2

full_example.description: Complete end-to-end v2 example: a greenhouse climate simulator paired with a multi-skill agent.

agent.description: Agent-side code: skills, perceptors, teacher, and training runner.

files.build_agent.py: Assembles and registers the Agent with all skills and perceptors — Skill includes training_cycles kwarg
files.config.py: Training hyperparameters and agent configuration — includes TRAINING_CYCLES_PER_SKILL
files.perceptors.py: Perceptor implementations for the greenhouse agent — ClimateDeltaPerceptor includes __await__ for v2 episode reset
files.teacher.py: SkillTeacher — reward, success, and termination logic
files.run_training_local.py: Entry point for running a training job locally

sim.description: Simulator-side code: ServerAmesa implementation, scenarios, and local runner.

files.server_impl.py: ServerAmesa subclass wiring the sim to AMESA gRPC
files.run_local.py: Entry point for running the simulator locally

files.Dockerfile: Multi-stage Docker image for the simulator

root_files.README.md: Developer getting-started guide (SSH key, pyenv, venv setup)
root_files..mcp.json: MCP server config pointing to https://api.amesa.com/v1/mcp

module_roots.amesa_core: Core SDK — Agent, Skill, Sensor, Scenario, SkillTeacher, SkillController, SkillCoach
module_roots.amesa_train: Training stack — Trainer, v2 event-based training loop, PPO
